name: chrX_Xq28_IDS_pseudogene_SD
description: Xq28 IDS (iduronate-2-sulfatase) locus with the IDS2 pseudogene ~20 kb telomeric in inverted orientation at >88% identity. NAHR between IDS and IDS2 causes the recurrent IDS inversion responsible for ~13% of severe Hunter syndrome (MPS II) cases. Adjacent to MECP2 and int22h regions.

architecture.internal_structure: Functional IDS gene + IDS2 pseudogene in inverted orientation; NAHR creates IDS-disrupting inversion.

related_diseases: IDS recurrent inversion (~13% of severe MPS II)
